# Teamwork Graph CLI

> Public home for Atlassian Teamwork Graph CLI users, release notes, issue
> tracking, and agent marketplace integration notes.

TWG CLI (`twg`) is an agent-first command line interface for Atlassian work
context across Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, Atlas, Jira Service Management,
Assets, people, teams, and the Atlassian Teamwork Graph.

## Primary Links

- Repository: https://github.com/atlassian/twg-cli
- Stable installer: https://teamwork-graph.atlassian.com/cli/install
- Stable manifest: https://teamwork-graph.atlassian.com/cli/manifest.json
- Changelog: https://teamwork-graph.atlassian.com/cli/CHANGELOG.md
- Homebrew tap: https://github.com/atlassian/homebrew-twg

## Key Files

- `/README.md` - install, scope, and issue-tracking entrypoints.
- `/AGENTS.md` - instructions for agents working in this repo.
- `/docs/public-repo-governance.md` - repo intent, public/private boundary, and
  pre-automation operating model.
- `/docs/release-integration.md` - release and changelog integration notes.
- `/skills/` - public TWG agent skills.
- `/plugins/codex/README.md` - Codex plugin packaging notes.
- `/plugins/claude/README.md` - Claude plugin packaging notes.
- `/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` - public issue intake forms.

## Public Safety

This repo is public-facing. Do not include tokens, credentials, internal links,
customer data, local paths, private build outputs, or internal-only command docs.
